step_by_step_thinking: The correct option is D, gutta-percha. Radiolucent properties differ among endodontic materials with gutta-percha being more similar to tooth structure (dentin).
raw_response:
The correct option is D, gutta-percha. Radiolucent properties differ among endodontic materials with gutta-percha being more similar to tooth structure (dentin). Option A, Zinc oxide eugenol paste (ZOE), typically appears slightly denser on X-rays due to its composition. Options B and C would appear even less dense or "whiter" compared to natural teeth because they contain higher concentrations of calcium compounds which have lower atomic numbers and thus greater radiopacity.
Answer: **D** Guttapercha.
